description: All settings on one scrollable page. Avatar hero at top, sections stacked below in accordion groups.

css_layout_rules..profile-hero: padding: 3rem 2rem 2rem; text-align: center; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
css_layout_rules..profile-body: padding: 2rem; max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;
